summary: Iteration 15: Tested new Score Comparison feature, component splitting (ScoreRing, ResumePreview, ScoreComparison, constants.js), and chatbot hiding on resume pages. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. All new features verified and working.
passed_tests: GET /api/resume/pricing - Returns pricing with product_name field
GET /api/resume/templates - Returns exactly 5 templates with style, prompt_instruction
POST /api/resume/upload - Accepts PDF files correctly
POST /api/resume/upload - Rejects invalid file formats with 400
POST /api/resume/analyze - Returns overall_score and ats_score for comparison
POST /api/resume/analyze - Validates resume_id required
POST /api/auth/login - Admin login with admin@diocreations.com works
POST /api/auth/login - Invalid credentials returns 401
POST /api/auth/login - Validates required fields
GET /api/ - Root endpoint returns API info
GET /api/drive/status - Returns {configured: false}
POST /api/resume/linkedin-scrape - Returns response for valid LinkedIn URL
POST /api/resume/linkedin-scrape - Invalid URL returns 400
UI: Chatbot IS visible on homepage / (Dio widget in bottom-right)
UI: Chatbot is HIDDEN on /resume-optimizer page (cleaner UX - P3 feature)
UI: Resume Optimizer page loads with 4-step progress bar
UI: Step progress shows Upload → Analysis → Optimize → Download
UI: Upload button and Google Drive button visible on step 1
UI: ScoreRing component renders scores correctly (Overall Score, ATS Score)
UI: Score Comparison card visible on step 2 with 'Choose File to Compare' button
UI: Template selection grid with 5 template cards (step 2)
UI: Font size controls (A-/A+) visible on results step (step 4)
UI: Visual template switcher (Classic, Modern, Executive, Minimal, Bold)
UI: LinkedIn tab visible with URL input, headline, about, experience fields
UI: ResumePreview component renders formatted resume correctly
UI: Edit Text button visible on results step
critical_code_review_comments: Component splitting complete: ScoreRing.jsx, ResumePreview.jsx, ScoreComparison.jsx, constants.js all extracted correctly
ResumeOptimizerPage.jsx now ~575 lines (improved from 975 lines in iteration 14)
Chatbot hiding implemented via Layout.jsx HIDE_CHAT_PATHS check for /resume-optimizer and /cover-letter
Score Comparison uses client-side comparison of two analysis objects - no new backend endpoints needed
All data-testid attributes properly added for automated testing
seed_data_creation: Created test PDF at /tmp/test_resume.pdf for upload testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Score Comparison feature works entirely client-side. User uploads first resume → gets analysis → can upload second resume in ScoreComparison card → sees side-by-side bar comparisons with delta badges. Chatbot (DioChat) is hidden on /resume-optimizer and /cover-letter paths via Layout.jsx. Visual templates (Classic, Modern, Executive, Minimal, Bold) switch the resume preview styling instantly. Font controls (A-/A+) adjust preview font size from 10-18px.

features_verified.score_comparison: WORKING - Card appears on step 2, upload second resume shows side-by-side bars with delta badges
features_verified.component_splitting: COMPLETE - ScoreRing, ResumePreview, ScoreComparison, constants all extracted
features_verified.chatbot_hiding: WORKING - Hidden on /resume-optimizer, visible on homepage
features_verified.font_size_controls: WORKING - A-/A+ visible on step 4 results
features_verified.linkedin_tab: WORKING - URL input, manual fields, optimize button all present
